seoTitle: Lietinna vs Lileah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lietinna and Lileah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lietinna and Lileah.
heading: Lietinna vs Lileah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lietinna, Tasmania and Lileah, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lileah has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Lietinna (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lietinna or Lileah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lietinna has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Lileah scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lietinna scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Lileah scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lietinna or Lileah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lileah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
